action.reasoning: Observation: Training succeeded (losses 1.52→0.45 over 128 steps on 512 samples, checkpoint saved as merged full model), but grounding_score=0.0 (mean_iou=0.0007, 6 invalid preds, all bbox). Predict ran but coords bad. Analysis: Undertrained (0.25 epoch on small subset); model not yet outputting accurate grid coords or format despite robust parser/rescale/clip/defaults. Prompt mismatch (no system msg in predict). Token/feature match fixed by full template + assistant-header masking + correct Qwen2_5_VL class. Eval container now works with merged save. With 5 iters/9.3h left, scale to 4096 samples + 2 epochs (~8200 steps, ~3h based on prior 1.3s/step) + lower LR + exact prompt match in predict + system msg should lift score substantially (target ≥0.25-0.35 per baseline papers). Keep max_pixels small for stability. Decision: Overwrite train.py (full non-truncated, larger scale, complete masking+metrics) and predict.py (exact training prompt+system, max_new_tokens=128), run test_prep+train then submit_eval for improved grounding_score + final time check.
